'''Feraa''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was to meet [[Suyin]] in [[Visquis]]'s underground lair to accept a shipment of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] for [[Vogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], only to get lost in its maze and die. [[Meetra Surik]] later found Feraa's corpse and datapad.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Corpse}}
